title: Beacons of Fun on National Lighthouse Day
story: Every August 7, lighthouse lovers celebrate National Lighthouse Day by visiting these towering ocean guardians! People climb spiral staircases to peek out from the top, take photos of the stunning views, and learn how lighthouses once saved ships from crashing into rocky shores. Many lighthouses host special tours, light up their beams extra bright, and share stories of brave lighthouse keepers who lived there long ago.
activity_question: What do people often climb on National Lighthouse Day?
follow_up_question: What would it feel like to be a lighthouse keeper living alone by the ocean?

title: Berry Delicious Cream Dream Day
story: Sweet red raspberries get paired with fluffy whipped cream every August 7 for National Raspberries and Cream Day! People celebrate by making classic desserts like raspberry shortcake, cream-filled tarts, and parfaits layered with fresh berries. Restaurants offer special raspberry cream treats, while families pick berries at local farms or whip up homemade desserts together. Social media fills with photos of gorgeous pink and white creations. Some people even eat raspberries and cream for breakfast on pancakes or waffles!
activity_question: What are some ways people celebrate National Raspberries and Cream Day?
activity_choices: Making shortcake and parfaits with raspberries and cream
Only eating raspberries without any cream
Painting pictures of berries instead of eating them
activity_answer: Making shortcake and parfaits with raspberries and cream
bonus_fact: Raspberries are actually made up of tiny individual fruits called drupelets!

title: Particularly Preposterous Packaging Day Gets Ridiculous
story: Every August 7, people celebrate National Particularly Preposterous Packaging Day by pointing out the most ridiculous packaging they can find! This silly holiday encourages everyone to notice when companies use way too much plastic, cardboard, or bubble wrap for tiny items. People share photos online of absurd examples like a single banana wrapped in plastic or a small toy buried in a giant box. Some families make it a game to find the most wasteful packaging at stores, while others use the day to talk about better ways to protect our planet from unnecessary waste.
activity_question: What do people share online during this holiday?
follow_up_question: What's the most wasteful packaging you've ever seen?

title: Splashing Into Sea Serpent Stories
story: Giant snakes with flippers swimming through deep ocean waters sound like something from a movie, but people have been spotting mysterious sea serpents for hundreds of years! Every August 7, National Sea Serpent Day celebrates these legendary creatures that might be hiding in our seas. Fans share spooky sea monster stories online, post drawings of long-necked beasts rising from waves, and debate whether famous sightings like Scotland's Loch Ness Monster could be real. Some people visit aquariums to see actual sea creatures, while others watch documentaries about unexplained ocean mysteries. It's the perfect day to wonder what strange animals might still be undiscovered in the deepest parts of our oceans!
activity_question: What do people do on National Sea Serpent Day to celebrate these mysterious creatures?
activity_choices: Share stories and post drawings online
Go swimming in the deepest ocean
Feed real sea serpents at the zoo
activity_answer: Share stories and post drawings online
follow_up_question: What other mysterious creatures do you think might be hiding in unexplored parts of our planet?

title: Underwear Day: The Ultimate Undie Celebration!
story: Every August 7, people celebrate National Underwear Day by showing off their most colorful, silly, or comfortable underwear! Some folks post photos of their favorite undies on social media, while others wear bright boxers or fun panties as outerwear. Clothing stores offer special sales on underwear, and people share jokes about their most embarrassing underwear moments. It's a day to appreciate the clothes we wear closest to our skin and have a good laugh about something everyone needs but rarely talks about!
activity_question: How do people typically celebrate National Underwear Day?
activity_choices: By posting photos of their favorite underwear on social media
By wearing only socks all day
By singing underwear songs at school
activity_answer: By posting photos of their favorite underwear on social media
follow_up_question: What's the silliest pattern or design you've ever seen on underwear?
